event.description: One daemon event record to forward.

DaemonEventRecord.description:
Wire shape of one daemon event record forwarded to notifiers.

Mirrors `protocol::DaemonEventRecord` from `animus-cli` so the daemon
can hand its native event record over the wire without translation.
Kept in this crate (rather than imported from the main protocol
crate) so notifier plugin authors only need to depend on this crate
+ `animus-plugin-runtime`.

project_root.description: Optional project root path this event is about.

schema.description: Schema URI for the event payload (e.g. `"animus.daemon-event.v1"`).

seq.description: Monotonic sequence number assigned by the daemon for this run.

timestamp.description: RFC3339 timestamp the daemon stamped at emission.
